config_use_rule: Use as transformed pattern guidance only; do not copy claims, real-person visuals, or copyrighted clips.

scene_types.ai_generation_rule: fictional civic debate scene; no real politician likeness
generic hearing room with papers and microphones; no party logo
cinematic desk with blurred public document shapes; avoid fake official numbers
original title-card design; do not imitate SBS/MBC/JTBC UI
generic speaker silhouette or crowd scene; no real face synthesis
generic assembly/court/government exterior; no exact logo

layout_variety_rule: Do not use the same card layout for more than two consecutive scenes. Forbidden repeats: text-only cards, fake broadcast UI, real-person face synthesis, party logos, paper headline cards, blurred stock crowds.
